Package com.dassault_systemes.catjdialog


class CATHookupNotification

Class Hierarchy

Class Location


Framework : CATJDialog

Module : CATJDialog

Class Description

public class CATHookupNotification
The hookup notification object.

Used by the hookup service.
Every notification sent through the session hookup should derive from this class.

see also:
CATNotification
com.dassault_systemes.catjdialog.CATHookup

Constructor Summary

CATHookupNotification(Object iObject) Creates a hookup notification with the specified object (for any purpose).

public Object getObject() Returns the object that was passed to the notification.
